premise: A trend-style chooser short invites the viewer to pick a girlfriend archetype, then cycles a single adult female lead through multiple themed wardrobe identities in the same room.
plot_type: labelled archetype parade with comedic costume punchline

cast.description: One brunette adult woman remains the only visible person across every scene.

continuity_rules: Only one adult female lead appears in the package; do not add friends, parents, partners, or alternate-age versions.
The same living-room corner remains locked across all scenes: pale wall, cream sectional sofa, cream throw blanket, pale rug, and a pink uplight glow near the corner.
Camera language stays constant: centered full-body framing, vertical smartphone look, and a locked tripod perspective.
Each scene expresses its archetype mostly through wardrobe, minor hair styling changes, and a matching text label rather than through a new location or new cast.
The TikTok watermark is source-only and should not be regenerated; readable text should be added cleanly in Shotstack.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: The full plot is fully explained by one performer changing looks in place. No implied off-screen family, partner, friend, or childhood self is necessary.

scene_arc.beat: Hook and baseline outfit establish the challenge.
Second archetype: soft romantic girly look.
